name: project-icy
description: AI dual-form content studio: anime <-> realistic paired generation

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names web,worker "pnpm --filter studio dev:web" "pnpm --filter studio worker"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names web,worker "pnpm --filter studio start:web" "pnpm --filter studio worker"
